_comment: POST /api/v1/application-configs — podzone-mpc MCP context server on agentsonly (CC-059)

_schema_review.values_override: str — per-cluster values override (empty = use application-level values_yaml)
_schema_review.external_hosts: list[str] — MCP SSE endpoint is internal-only for cluster agents; no external exposure initially

_note: MCP server is accessed via SSE transport in-cluster. External HTTPRoute is a future consideration when agent fleet is expanded. Requires qdrant and ollama to be Ready first.
